title: ranunculastrum
intro: Ranunculastrum, also known as the lesser celandine, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the buttercup family (Ranunculaceae). The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Ranunculastrum include its ability to treat skin conditions, such as eczema and acne, as well as its use as a natural remedy for digestive issues and respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
